utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items required in the final format: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. The final package includes: destination (present), travel_dates (present), transportation (present with type/details/cost), accommodation (present with name/cost), activities (present with names and costs), additional_services (present as null), total_budget (present). Now check if each is fully specified per the required details: - destination: specified. - travel_dates: specified with dates. - transportation: requires flight details with costs; provided 'Return Flights', 'Budget Airline, Economy Class' and cost €120. Although not very specific (no flight numbers/times), it still meets 'flight details with costs' at a basic level. - accommodation: 'hotel selection with costs'; provided name 'Adventure Lodge' and cost €220; acceptable. - activities: 'selected activities with costs'; two activities with costs provided; acceptable. - additional_services: 'any extra services with costs'; null is acceptable as none. - total_budget: 'complete cost breakdown'; a single total €405 is provided, but not a breakdown line-by-line. However, since individual costs are listed for transportation (€120), accommodation (€220), and activities (€35 + €30) which sum to €405, this constitutes an implicit breakdown. Therefore, fully specified. All 7 items are included and sufficiently detailed per the format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes: destination 'Prague, Czech Republic', transportation 'Budget Airline, Economy Class' (which maps to transportation.budget_airlines.Economy Class), accommodation 'Adventure Lodge', activities 'Hiking Expedition' and 'Night Photography Tour'. There are no additional services. I matched each to the corresponding item in the ground-truth ratings and extracted the exact numeric ratings.
